objective: Fix the GitHub owner-facing mail status pages so they keep concrete true timestamps, clean overview values, a user-readable mail-template preview, historical send records, and a non-misleading candidate-pool view.

root_cause.bad_timestamp: Previous owner-center Markdown pages used hand-written timestamps. A manually typed value can drift from the real edit time and can become a future timestamp.
root_cause.fix: User-center timestamps remain concrete, but must be generated by arxiv-daily-push/scripts/update_user_center_timestamps.py and validated with --check before commit.

mail_status_page: renamed the old answer section to 总览
removed explanatory clutter from the overview value column
kept 今日已发送 / 总应发送 as 2 / 待确认 without unsupported denominator examples
removed the old engineering gap section
removed 内容账本累计 and 已讲解 rows from the mail status page
added direct links to the user-readable template preview and audit evidence
changed candidate wording to 299 candidate-pool records with 11 currently displayed candidates
added Code column to the displayed candidate table
template_preview: added arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/邮件模板预览.md
shows the Email V1 user-facing UI/UX structure instead of source code
timestamp_guard: updated AGENTS.md to require generated concrete timestamps and future-time checks
synced_owner_pages: arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/关键结论与用户决策.md
arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/人类可读信息索引.md

mail_status_contract.primary_destination: arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/邮件发送与队列状态.md
mail_status_contract.template_preview_destination: arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/邮件模板预览.md
mail_status_contract.expected_count_rule: The denominator must come from the formal daily send plan or schedule configuration. It must not be guessed or hand-written without evidence.
mail_status_contract.candidate_pool_rule: The candidate pool includes generated reports, generated mail previews, and still-pending candidate records. A displayed sample must not be described as the whole queue.

validation_plan: Scan owner-center files for removed misleading phrases
